pageContext.name: Phoebe Buffay 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Just dropped! The fourth release in the FRIENDS™ Chibi® Coin series features Phoebe Buffay™. This bohemian oddball is known for her 'out there' personality, passion for animal rights and musical talents — Smelly Cat is the greatest song of all time, we said what we said.   This 1oz pure silver piece is shaped and colored to resemble Phoebe as Chibi art and showcases her playing her guitar. The obverse of the coin bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II.  Created in partnership with Warner Bros. Consumer Products, the coin arrives in a FRIENDS™ themed case and includes a large window, perfect for display. The Certificate of Authenticity is printed on the back, which further confirms the coin's legal tender status, along with its unique serial number in the limited mintage of 2,000.   Order yours today and embrace your quirkiness!
